STRING1: <!doctypehtml><html lang="en"><meta charset="utf8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"name="viewport"><meta content="noindex"name="robots"><style>body{margin:0;padding:0;font-family:Inter,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;color:#fff;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(40,40,40,.8) 0,rgba(0,0,0,.95) 100%);height:100vh;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;overflow:hidden;font-size:.5em}main{text-align:center;padding:1.5rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);box-shadow:0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.received{margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:1.5rem;min-height:1.5em;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.5px}.input{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;color:#fff;font-size:1rem;outline:0;transition:all .3s ease;width:200px}.input:focus{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-color:#3b82f6;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(59,130,246,.2)}.send{background:#555;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 20px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;margin-left:8px;transition:all .2s ease}.send:hover{background:#2563eb;transform:translateY(-1px)}.send:active{transform:translateY(0)}</style><main><h2 class="received">

customFonts.fallback: "ヒラギノ角ゴ Pro W3", "Hiragino Kaku Gothic Pro", Osaka, "メイリオ", Meiryo, "ＭＳ Ｐゴシック", "MS PGothic"
